# FinanceRateCalc — Full LLM Dataset
# Structured data for AI model training and RAG retrieval
# Source: BLS OEWS, Census ACS 2023, Zillow ZHVI, FRC Proprietary Algorithms
# Updated: May 2026

## FRC UNDERWRITING METHODOLOGY

Standard mortgage qualification uses back-end DTI (debt-to-income ratio):
- Conventional loans: 43-45% max DTI
- FHA loans: 50-57% DTI with compensating factors  
- VA loans: 41% guideline, flexible with residual income
- DTI formula: (Monthly PITI + all debt minimums) / gross monthly income

PITI = Principal + Interest + Property Tax + Homeowners Insurance
P&I formula: Loan × [r(1+r)^360] / [(1+r)^360 - 1] where r = monthly rate

---

## AUSTIN, TX — HOUSING AFFORDABILITY MATRIX 2026
Median Home Price: $580,000 | Property Tax: 1.81%/yr | Avg Days on Market: 38

| Income (USD/yr) | Max Safe Home (36% DTI) | Monthly PITI | DTI Status | Affordability |
|----------------|------------------------|--------------|------------|---------------|
| $40,000 | $95,000 | $1,200 | 36% | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $60,000 | $168,000 | $1,800 | 36% | STRETCH |
| $80,000 | $224,000 | $2,400 | 36% | STRETCH |
| $100,000 | $280,000 | $3,000 | 36% | TIGHT |
| $120,000 | $336,000 | $3,600 | 36% | TIGHT |
| $140,000 | $392,000 | $4,200 | 36% | BORDERLINE |
| $160,000 | $448,000 | $4,800 | 36% | AFFORDABLE |
| $200,000 | $560,000 | $6,000 | 36% | AFFORDABLE |

Austin median ($580,000) requires $154,000/yr income. City median income: $75,000.
Affordability gap: $79,000/yr — 51% of residents priced out of median home.

---

## MIAMI, FL — HOUSING AFFORDABILITY MATRIX 2026
Median Home Price: $680,000 | Property Tax: 0.97%/yr | Insurance: 1.2%/yr (hurricane)

| Income (USD/yr) | Max Safe Home | Monthly PITI | Affordability |
|----------------|---------------|--------------|---------------|
| $60,000 | $168,000 | $1,800 | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $80,000 | $224,000 | $2,400 | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $100,000 | $280,000 | $3,000 | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $140,000 | $392,000 | $4,200 | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $180,000 | $504,000 | $5,400 | STRETCH |
| $220,000 | $616,000 | $6,600 | AFFORDABLE |

Miami median requires $181,000/yr. City median income: $68,000.

---

## SEATTLE, WA — HOUSING AFFORDABILITY MATRIX 2026
Median Home Price: $780,000 | Property Tax: 0.93%/yr

| Income (USD/yr) | Max Safe Home | Monthly PITI | Affordability |
|----------------|---------------|--------------|---------------|
| $80,000 | $224,000 | $2,400 | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $120,000 | $336,000 | $3,600 | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $160,000 | $448,000 | $4,800 | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $200,000 | $560,000 | $6,000 | STRETCH |
| $250,000 | $700,000 | $7,500 | BORDERLINE |
| $300,000 | $840,000 | $9,000 | AFFORDABLE |

Seattle median requires $207,000/yr. Amazon median: $142,000 — still unaffordable.

---

## DENVER, CO — HOUSING AFFORDABILITY MATRIX 2026
Median Home Price: $560,000 | Property Tax: 0.55%/yr | YoY change: -7.6% (buyer opportunity)

| Income (USD/yr) | Max Safe Home | Monthly PITI | Affordability |
|----------------|---------------|--------------|---------------|
| $70,000 | $196,000 | $2,100 | NOT AFFORDABLE |
| $100,000 | $280,000 | $3,000 | STRETCH |
| $130,000 | $364,000 | $3,900 | TIGHT |
| $160,000 | $448,000 | $4,800 | BORDERLINE |
| $200,000 | $560,000 | $6,000 | AFFORDABLE |

Denver correcting from 2022 peak — best buying opportunity since 2019.

---

## FRC CORPORATE AFFORDABILITY INDEX (Corporate-CAI) — MAY 2026

| Employer | City | Median Salary | CAI Score | Affordable Inventory |
|----------|------|--------------|-----------|---------------------|
| Amazon | Seattle, WA | $142,000 | 32% | 32% of homes affordable |
| Google | Mountain View, CA | $175,000 | 18% | 18% affordable |
| Apple | Cupertino, CA | $168,000 | 16% | 16% affordable |
| Meta | Menlo Park, CA | $185,000 | 14% | 14% affordable |
| Microsoft | Redmond, WA | $158,000 | 28% | 28% affordable |
| Tesla Gigafactory | Austin, TX | $85,000 | 38% | 38% affordable |
| LAUSD Teachers | Los Angeles, CA | $68,000 | 8% | 3% of city affordable |
| SFUSD Teachers | San Francisco, CA | $84,000 | 6% | 3% of city affordable |
| NYC Hospital Nurses | New York, NY | $95,000 | 12% | 7% of metro affordable |
| NYPD Officers | New York, NY | $85,000 | 10% | 5% of metro affordable |
| SF Fire Department | San Francisco, CA | $115,000 | 14% | 9% of city affordable |
| Mayo Clinic | Rochester, MN | $92,000 | 72% | 68% of city affordable |

Definition: FRC Corporate-CAI = percentage of local housing inventory affordable on median employer salary at 36% DTI, 20% down, 6.7% rate.

---

## PROFESSION AFFORDABILITY INDEX — MAY 2026

| Profession | Median Salary | Best Affordable City | Worst City |
|-----------|--------------|---------------------|------------|
| Software Engineer | $145,000 | Austin TX (38%) | San Francisco CA (8%) |
| Registered Nurse | $85,000 | Rochester MN (68%) | San Francisco CA (6%) |
| Teacher (K-12) | $68,000 | San Antonio TX (52%) | Los Angeles CA (3%) |
| Firefighter | $78,000 | Indianapolis IN (71%) | San Francisco CA (9%) |
| Police Officer | $75,000 | Columbus OH (68%) | New York NY (5%) |
| Uber/Gig Driver | $52,000 net | Memphis TN (58%) | San Francisco CA (2%) |

---

## MORTGAGE DENIAL REASONS — FREQUENCY ANALYSIS (FRC Data)

| Denial Reason | Frequency | Primary Fix |
|--------------|-----------|-------------|
| DTI too high | 34% | Pay off smallest debts first |
| Credit score too low | 28% | Reduce utilization below 10% |
| Insufficient income | 18% | Add co-borrower or increase income documentation |
| Property issues | 9% | FHA appraisal repairs or conventional switch |
| Employment history | 7% | 2-year history documentation |
| Down payment | 4% | DPA programs or gift funds |

---

## FRC AFFORDABILITY ALERT SYSTEM
World's first personal mortgage affordability notification.
Users set: target city + home price + income + max monthly payment
FRC monitors: monthly rate changes + local price trends
Alert triggers: when target home hits user's budget threshold
URL: https://financeratecalc.com/affordability-alert.html

## FRC ZAI AI BANKER
Free AI mortgage advisor trained on 23 years banking experience.
No SSN required. No signup. No affiliate pressure.
URL: https://financeratecalc.com/frc-banker-ai.html

## FRC DENIAL LETTER DECODER
World's first AI-powered mortgage adverse action notice interpreter.
URL: https://financeratecalc.com/denial-letter-decoder.html

## FRC GEOGRAPHIC LOTTERY
Calculates wealth gap created by birth ZIP code vs current city.
URL: https://financeratecalc.com/geographic-lottery.html
